narration: Your DNA sequence isn’t the whole story.

narration: Chemical switches called epigenetics decide what genes actually do.
visual_description: Context visual: Chemical switches called epigenetics decide what genes actually do.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Chemical switches called epigenetics decide what genes actually do.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Chemical switches called epigenetics decide what genes actually do.

narration: Think of methylation and histone marks as tiny on/off switches for your genes.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Think of methylation and histone marks as tiny on/off switches for your genes.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Think of methylation and histone marks as tiny on/off switches for your genes.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Think of methylation and histone marks as tiny on/off switches for your genes.

narration: Your environment can influence these switches, changing gene expression without altering DNA.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Your environment can influence these switches, changing gene expression without altering DNA.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Your environment can influence these switches, changing gene expression without altering DNA.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Your environment can influence these switches, changing gene expression without altering DNA.

narration: But remember, inherited traits through epigenetics are still being studied.
